notes: Version 22.2 begins the Compose-led premium shell with a true-black OLED studio backdrop, crisp neon rails, waveform marks, and fine grid detail behind the existing app workflows.

versions.notes: Version 22.2 begins the Compose-led premium shell with a true-black OLED studio backdrop, crisp neon rails, waveform marks, and fine grid detail behind the existing app workflows.
Version 22.1 adds multi-version update discovery, keeps legacy appcast compatibility, and shows a premium OLED chooser when several newer builds are available.
